name: Full A-to-Z Alphabet
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a complete alphabet chart showing all 26 uppercase letters from A to Z arranged in neat rows, each letter a big bold rounded shape, evenly spaced like a classroom poster

name: Bubble Letter A
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a single giant puffy bubble letter A taking up most of the page, rounded plump edges, plenty of open space inside to color, a few small stars floating around it

name: A for Apple
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a big uppercase letter A on the left and a round shiny apple with a leaf and short stem on the right, the apple smiling with a happy face, the word apple suggested below in simple block letters

name: B for Bear
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a large uppercase letter B beside a cute round teddy bear sitting up with rounded ears and a friendly smile, the bear waving one paw, simple and chunky for young children

name: C for Cat
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a big uppercase letter C next to a sitting cartoon cat with pointed ears, whiskers, and a curled tail, a content smile on its face, simple shapes for easy coloring

name: Toddler Letter D
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: one enormous simple uppercase letter D filling the whole page with very thick rounded outlines and a wide open center, nothing else, designed for tiny hands to color inside

name: Uppercase and Lowercase E
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a large uppercase letter E side by side with a matching lowercase letter e, both bold and rounded, a small star between them, arranged to compare the two forms

name: Alphabet Train
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a cheerful cartoon train chugging along, an engine pulling several boxcars, each car carrying one large letter spelling out the beginning of the alphabet, puffs of smoke and round wheels, a friendly face on the engine

name: Letter F Close-Up
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a close-up of a single decorative uppercase letter F filling the page, the inside of the letter divided into simple patterned sections like flowers and dots ready to color, a thick clean border around it

name: S for Sun
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a big uppercase letter S beside a smiling round sun with wavy and pointed rays all around it, a cheerful face on the sun, simple bold shapes for young children

name: ABC Building Blocks
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: three stacked toy cube blocks, each block showing one large letter spelling A, B, and C on its front face, a few scattered blocks resting on the ground beside the stack, rounded playful edges

name: Alphabet Activity Maze
subject: education/alphabet
prompt: a simple winding path maze shaped like a curvy alphabet trail with a start at the letter A and a finish at the letter Z, a few letters dotted along the route, a smiling pencil character waiting at the start
